tasks.title: Listen Layer Paper: ALME conflict patching on Qwen2-Audio
tasks.definition_of_done: Listen Layer localized for Qwen2-Audio

tasks.title: News: Power Steering: Behavior Steering via Layer-to-Layer Jacobia
tasks.definition_of_done: Read and note key insights. Source: https://www.alignmentforum.org/posts/power-steering-jacobian-singular-vectors

tasks.title: GCBench-14 real Whisper run: port gsae_boundary_mock.py to actual Whisper-base hidden states (3s LibriSpeech CPU)
tasks.definition_of_done: Run GSAE boundary detection on real Whisper-base activations for 3s clip; F1 > 0.7 on ≥3 phoneme boundaries

tasks.title: Silence x t* quantitative threshold: sweep silence_fraction → t* curve; inflection = hallucination risk threshold
tasks.definition_of_done: silence_tstar_threshold.py: sweep silence 0-100%; find inflection point where t* < 4 consistently; quantitative threshold

tasks.title: Attention entropy x AND-gate: identify commitment heads (low entropy + AND-gate dominant correlation)
tasks.definition_of_done: attn_entropy_gate_mock.py: mock per-head entropy × AND-frac; top-3 commitment heads identified; r < -0.6

tasks.title: Isolate(k) x beam diversity: higher Isolate at gc_peak → more diverse beam hypotheses
tasks.definition_of_done: isolate_beam_diversity_mock.py: Pearson r(Isolate_gc_peak, beam_entropy) > 0.6; audio-grounded = richer hypothesis space

tasks.title: VLM AND/OR gate analogy: image-grounded (AND) vs text-predictable (OR) features in Vision-Language Models
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: VLM RAVEL extension — image patches as audio analog; AND-frac proxy via patching causation; novelty case

tasks.title: gc(k) x SNR robustness: AND-gate features degrade faster under noise than OR-gate features
tasks.definition_of_done: snr_gate_mock.py: noise at SNR 0-30dB; AND-frac slope > 2x OR-frac slope; links to hearing degradation model

tasks.title: GCBench-14 generalization: t* boundary detector for speaker turns and musical onsets beyond phonemes
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: extend GCBench-14 to speaker diarization boundaries + musical note onsets; expected F1 transfer > 0.6

tasks.title: AND-frac scaling with Whisper model size: larger models → higher AND-frac at gc_peak?
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc + mock: Whisper base→small→medium→large AND-frac at gc_peak trend; scaling law for audio commitment

tasks.title: FAD bias x accented speech: accented phonemes show lower AND-frac (treated as text-predictable by model)
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: accented vs native phoneme pairs → AND-frac hypothesis; AccentDB/L2-ARCTIC source; bias discrimination link

tasks.title: AND-gate steerability mock: activation patch to boost AND-frac for high-PPL phonemes → bias correction PoC
tasks.definition_of_done: steer_and_gate_mock.py: add direction vector to SAE feature; AND-frac increases ≥0.15; WER improves on mock

tasks.title: News: New RFP on Interpretability from Schmidt Sciences
tasks.definition_of_done: Read and note key insights. Source: https://www.alignmentforum.org/posts/Pc789vx2oHgEXYZZH/new-rfp-on-interpretabili

tasks.title: News: Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages
tasks.blocked_by: ai.meta.com auth wall — cannot access paper without Meta login
tasks.definition_of_done: Read and note key insights. Source: https://ai.meta.com/research/publications/omnilingual-mt-machine-translation-for

tasks.title: vcbench_mock.py: VLM AND/OR gate pipeline scaffold (mock activations)
tasks.definition_of_done: Pipeline runs: mock image-patch activations → vc(k) curve → AND-frac at vc_peak → Pearson r with mock CHAIR labels

tasks.title: Literature: RAVEL causal scrubbing for vision patch tokens — does AND-frac proxy work for VLMs?
tasks.definition_of_done: Check if RAVEL patching directly applies to VLM image tokens; note any adaptation needed for vcbench

tasks.title: accent_and_frac_mock.py: mock L2-ARCTIC phoneme pairs → AND-frac per category → validate delta hypothesis
tasks.definition_of_done: mock script runs; AND-frac(native) > AND-frac(accented) delta >= 0.08; per-L1 breakdown table; Pearson r(AND-frac, mock WER) < -0.5

tasks.title: phoneme_confusion_l2_mock.py: extend Q130 confusion×gate analysis to L2-ARCTIC accent groups
tasks.definition_of_done: L2 phoneme pairs show higher confusion AND lower AND-frac vs native pairs; r(confusion_rate, AND-frac) < -0.55 for accent groups

tasks.title: tstar_accent_mock.py: accented speech induces earlier t* (hallucination risk); accent-fraction → t* shift curve
tasks.definition_of_done: mock shows accent_fraction correlates with t* < 4; slope > 0.8; links FAD bias to hallucination pathway

tasks.title: beam_diversity_accent_mock.py: Isolate(k) at gc_peak lower for accented phonemes → narrower beam hypotheses
tasks.definition_of_done: Pearson r(Isolate_gc_peak, beam_entropy) native > accented delta >= 0.15; accented = collapsed hypothesis space

tasks.title: attn_entropy_accent_mock.py: commitment heads show higher entropy for accented phonemes (less committed)
tasks.definition_of_done: per-head entropy(accented) > per-head entropy(native) for top-3 commitment heads; delta >= 0.2 nats

tasks.title: and_gate_fairness_metric.py: define AND-frac Fairness Gap (AFG) = AND-frac(native) - AND-frac(accented); compute on L2-ARCTIC mock
tasks.definition_of_done: AFG computed per L1 group; Pearson r(AFG, mock_WER_gap) < -0.6; AFG >= 0.08 on >= 4 L1 groups

tasks.title: snr_accent_interaction_mock.py: compound degradation — accented phonemes lose AND-frac 2x faster under noise than native
tasks.definition_of_done: SNR 0-30dB sweep; accented AND-frac slope >= 2x native slope; links noise robustness to accent fairness

tasks.title: hallucination_accent_mock.py: accented phonemes behave like silence — AND-frac drop → hallucination steps increase
tasks.definition_of_done: mock: accent_level correlates with hallucination_steps; r < -0.6; AND-frac mediates the effect (mediation analysis mock)

tasks.title: accent_beam_rescoring_mock.py: AND-frac as beam rescoring signal for accented speech; fairness-aware rescoring
tasks.definition_of_done: rescoring improves mock WER gap between native/accented by >= 30%; AFG reduces after rescoring
